title: Skadi's Life Hunt
description: Skade Gaming's Lifesteal Server titled Skadi's Life Hunt's Official Modpack. A PVP Modpack
body:
# Skadis Life Hunt

Skadis Life Hunt is a Minecraft modpack designed for Skade Gaming's Vanaheim servers. It includes all the mods to smoothly enjoy Skade's Vanaheim Server & includes an optimized PVP experience for 1.21.1!

Although primarily made for Skade Gaming, Skadi's Life Hunt can be used anywhere!

## What Is Skade Gaming?

Skade Gaming is a free online gaming community for Autistics (14+) and family members and friends. we offer a unique and engaging experience for those who are on the autism spectrum and their friends and family.

You can find more about Skade Gaming and our goals on our website: [https://skadegaming.com/](https://skadegaming.com/)


Not all contents belong to, are made by, or are edited by Skade Gaming. Of note [All The Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons) is included in this modpack in a slightly modified state.
